title: Darth Nihl's predecessor
content:

{{Conjecture|legends}}

[[130 ABY]], [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]<ref name="Date">After [[Legacy (2006) 15|''Legacy'' (2006) 15]] left the exact timeline of [[Darth Nihl]]'s predecessor's [[Death/Legends|death]] unclear, [[John Ostrander]] clarified in a [https://web.archive.org/web/20080423013111/http://www.darkhorse.com/boards/viewtopic.php?t=12675 forum post] that they died during the [[Massacre at Ossus]], dated to around [[130 ABY]] by [[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]].</ref>

{{Quote|You are only a Hand because your predecessor died… prematurely… and Talon was not yet ready.|Darth Maladi, to Darth Nihl|<ref name="Leg15" />}}
A [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] was a member of the [[One Sith]] that served as the '''predecessor''' of<ref name="Leg15" /> the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]]<ref name="Leg1">[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]]</ref> [[Darth Nihl]] in the position of the [[Hand (One Sith)|Hand]] of<ref name="Leg15" /> the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]<ref name="Leg1" /> and leader of the One Sith [[Darth Krayt]].<ref name="Leg15" /> They participated in a [[Massacre at Ossus|massacre]] on<ref name="Forum">{{DHBoards|subdomain=www|url=boards/viewtopic.php?t=12675|thread=Imperial Knights question, post Essential Guide to the Force}}</ref> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="LECG">''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]''</ref> [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]<ref name="Forum" /> around [[130 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> during the events of which they [[Death/Legends|perished]].<ref name="Forum" /> In the wake of the massacre, Nihl was named the new Hand as [[Darth Talon]]—the intended successor—was not yet ready.<ref name="Leg15" />

[[137 ABY|Seven years later]],<ref name="Leg15" /> Sith Lady<ref name="Leg1" /> [[Darth Maladi]] pointed out to Nihl that—unlike the Sith Lord—Darth Talon had been a Sith since birth when explaining Krayt's obvious preference for the latter. The Sith Lady also added that Nihl only became a Hand following the predecessor's premature death because of Talon's unreadiness.<ref name="Leg15" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|We haven't given out other info about Nihl's predecessor and won't until it's germane to a story. No point.|John Ostrander|<ref name="Forum" />}}
The predecessor was mentioned in the [[Legacy (2006) 15|fifteenth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' comic series, written by [[John Ostrander]] and [[Jan Duursema]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Leg15" /> on [[August 8]], [[2007]].<ref name="DateRelease">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54387/star_wars_legacy_2006_15|text=Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 15}}</ref> In a forum post, Ostrander clarified that the Hand fell at Ossus during the massacre and Nihl was named as their replacement as a result, also stating that no other information about Nihl's predecessor is public and will not be until it is relevant to a story.<ref name="Forum" />
